name: Button / Primary
description: Primary CTA button - warm gold (#C8902A) on white, used for event registration and show links

name: Button / Secondary
description: Secondary action button - deep navy outline, used for secondary actions like Learn More

name: Input / Text
description: Single-line text input for newsletter sign-up and listener message forms

name: Card / Basic
description: Content card for episode summaries and event announcements

name: Quote / Block
description: Styled pull-quote block for scripture or reflective sayings used across Instagram stories

name: Sponsor / Badge
description: Sponsor acknowledgment badge - used for Covenant Insurance Group, Mitchell's Flowers, Bluff City Auto Care

name: Header / Show Banner
description: Full-width banner header with Morning Reflections logo and WGSP 1490 AM call sign

name: Speaker / Bio Card
description: Guest speaker bio card with photo slot, name, title, and episode date

name: Event / Flyer Header
description: Grace Community Church event header block with logo, date badge, and tagline area

name: Footer / Brand Bar
description: Footer strip with @morningreflectionsrebecca handle, WGSP 1490 AM, and website slot

name: Story / 9x16 Frame
description: Instagram Story frame - 1080x1920, warm earth tones, used for Saturday episode teaser posts

name: Divider / Decorative
description: Thin gold decorative divider line used between content sections in print and digital layouts

name: Icon / Cross
description: Simple stylized cross icon in brand gold - used as a section marker in church materials

name: Tag / Episode Number
description: Episode number pill tag - used in social media graphics and show notes pages

name: Avatar / Host
description: Rebecca Price host avatar - circular crop, used on all show graphics and the Instagram story header
